promoSubtitle: Celebrate Mom with luxurious treatments she'll love

services.name: Microshading Eyebrows
services.description: The perfect gift for Mom! Soft, powdered brow look with microshading permanent makeup. Wakes up beautiful for months to come.
services.fullDescription:
Give Mom the gift that lasts. Achieve beautiful, soft-shaded brows with our microshading technique. This permanent makeup method creates a powdered, filled-in look similar to makeup, perfect for Moms who want fuller-looking brows without the daily fuss. A truly thoughtful Mother's Day gift she'll thank you for every single morning.

Includes:
• Custom brow shape consultation
• Premium pigment selection
• Soft, natural powdered finish
• Aftercare kit
• Complimentary touch-up included

services.name: Anti-Aging Facial
services.description: Help Mom turn back the clock with our comprehensive anti-aging facial. Targets fine lines, wrinkles, and restores youthful glow.
services.fullDescription:
Give Mom the gift of radiant, youthful skin. Our Anti-Aging Facial targets fine lines, wrinkles, and loss of firmness with advanced techniques for visible rejuvenation.

Includes:
• Cleanser
• Toner
• Exfoliation scrub with Alpha-hydroxy acids
• Clarisonic Brush Cleanse
• Steam
• Extraction
• Glycolic acid
• Collagen infusing mask
• Eye herbal treatment
• Hand Paraffin treatment

services.name: Underarm Laser Hair Removal
services.description: Give Mom the gift of smooth, hair-free underarms. Gentle laser treatment with long-lasting results — no more daily shaving!
services.fullDescription: The gift Mom deserves — freedom from daily shaving! Our Women's Underarm Laser treatment provides a gentle yet effective solution for permanent hair reduction. Designed specifically for women's delicate underarm skin, this treatment offers lasting smoothness and one less thing on Mom's busy to-do list.

services.name: Spa Escape Package
services.description: The ultimate Mother's Day escape! Full-body renewal with body scrub, manicure, pedicure, and express facial. Pure indulgence.
services.fullDescription: Treat Mom to a full-body renewal she'll never forget. Begin with a soothing Aroma Body Scrub, gently exfoliating and leaving her skin silky smooth. Followed by a refreshing shower, a perfect Manicure and Pedicure, and finished with an Aroma Express Facial for that extra glow. Two hours of pure pampering — exactly what Mom deserves.

services.name: Luxurious Pampering Package For Her
services.description: Help Mom forget the stress of busy life. Aromatherapy massage, luxurious facial, and hot mitten hand & foot treatment.
services.fullDescription:
This package is special for the Mom you love. It will help her relax and forget the stress of her busy life — exactly what every Mom needs.

Includes:
• 30-minute aromatherapy body massage
• Luxurious facial with neck massage
• Aromatherapy steam, extraction, and mask
• Hand and foot massage with hot mittens

100 minutes of pure bliss designed to make Mom feel like the queen she is.
